title: The Dain Curse
author: Dashiell Hammett
description: A diamond glinting in the grass outside the Leggetts’ front door gives the first clue to a burglary, and sets our narrator on the trail of a shadowy mastermind whose plans always seem one step ahead. But whether he’s having to deal with explosions, cults, car chases, or even the titular Dain family curse, our hard-boiled private detective remains calm and collected while inching closer to the truth. The unnamed narrator of The Dain Curse (known these days by the nickname of the Continental Op) i...
